name: Seafood
description: Dive into ocean-inspired flavors where freshness and delicate textures create a refined and vibrant culinary experience.

name: Lamb
description: Discover rich and aromatic lamb dishes where tender meat meets deep, savory flavors and timeless culinary traditions.

name: Starter
description: Begin your meal with light and enticing starters designed to awaken the appetite and set the tone for the courses ahead.

name: Chicken
description: Enjoy versatile chicken dishes crafted with balanced spices and comforting flavors that suit every palate.

name: Beef
description: Indulge in bold and hearty beef creations where deep flavor, tenderness, and culinary craftsmanship come together.

name: Dessert
description: Go on a taste journey where every bite is a sweet expression of creativity and refined gastronomic pleasure.

name: Vegan
description: Explore vibrant plant-based dishes where natural ingredients transform into wholesome and inspiring culinary creations.

name: Pork
description: Experience savory pork dishes where rich textures and balanced seasoning deliver comforting and satisfying flavors.

name: Vegetarian
description: Discover flavorful vegetarian plates where fresh ingredients and creative combinations celebrate the beauty of meat-free cuisine.

name: Miscellaneous
description: A collection of unique and diverse dishes that bring together unexpected flavors and creative culinary ideas.

name: Pasta
description: Enjoy comforting pasta dishes where silky sauces and perfectly cooked noodles create timeless Italian-inspired harmony.

name: Breakfast
description: Start the day with warm and energizing breakfast creations designed to bring comfort and flavor to the morning table.

name: Side
description: Complement your main course with carefully crafted side dishes that add balance, texture, and depth to every meal.

name: Goat
description: Discover distinctive goat dishes where tender meat and bold seasoning create a rich and memorable flavor experience.

name: Soup
description: Warm up with comforting soups where slow-simmered ingredients build deep aromas and nourishing flavors.
